devdoc.title: ConfidentialOTC - Private OTC Trading with FHE

SenderNotAllowedToUseHandle(bytes32,addr.notice: Returned if the sender is not allowed to use the handle.

ZamaProtocolUnsupported().notice: Returned if the Zama protocol is not supported on the current chain

createOrder(bytes32,bytes,bytes32,bytes,.notice: Create an OTC order with encrypted price and amount

fillOrder(uint256).notice: Fill an open order as the taker

getAmount(uint256).notice: Get encrypted amount (only accessible by allowed addresses)

getOrder(uint256).notice: Get public fields of an order

getPrice(uint256).notice: Get encrypted price (only accessible by allowed addresses)

grantAccess(uint256,address).notice: Maker grants a specific address permission to view encrypted fields

userdoc.notice: Encrypted price & amount prevent front-running and information leakage.         Only counterparties can decrypt trade details.
